name: standards-refresh.sh refuses to write a source's file when the fetch yields zero usable rules and fails the entry loud
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r30-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && printf '

no headings here at all

' > $OUT/s.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 1 ] && [ ! -f $OUT/out/european-union/r30-src.yaml ] && grep -q 'INSUFFICIENT sid=r30-src rule_count=0' e.err && grep -q 'refusing to write' e.err && echo zero-rules-refuses-write 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
